posts.author: Hillyard (Zach)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Would it be possible to add a time tracking column to the items under “My Work”?

What are you trying to achieve

Having the start and stop functionality directly on the “My Work” column would save time when designers are working on projects and not having to open the item card.
